caption: Against a solid yellow background, the video begins with a logo featuring a stylized cartoon face of a man wearing sunglasses and a red Santa hat, with a Bitcoin symbol on the hat's pompom, next to the lowercase text "tradesanta". As the scene transitions, a cartoon robot character appears, also wearing a red Santa hat with horns. The robot is dressed in a business suit with a tie and a name tag that reads "Ludo". It possesses multiple mechanical arms, which it uses to multitask: one arm holds a blue telephone receiver to its ear, another holds a white document, and a third holds a blue folder. In front of the robot is a white laptop. In the final stage of the sequence, two speech bubbles appear above the robot's head; the left bubble contains the word "BUY" and the right bubble contains the word "SELL".
